title: PRD-Creator Input Contract
description: Defines the input parameters for the PRD-Creator skill, supporting both direct and orchestrated modes.

mode.description: Operational mode. Direct: interacts with the user. Orchestrated: invoked by another agent with structured context.

initialRequest.description: The raw user request or initial problem statement.

contextSchema.description: Contextual information for the PRD (primarily used in Orchestrated mode).

module.description: The specific module or feature area.

techStack.description: List of technologies to be used.

projectRules.description: List of project-specific rules or guidelines.

constraints.description: Explicit constraints (architectural, technical, design) for the feature.
